testcase.name: test_default_endpoint
testcase.failure:
def test_default_endpoint(): td = api.API("apikey") > assert isinstance(td.http, requests.Session) ^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'API' object has no attribute 'http'
tdclient/test/api_test.py:52: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_endpoint_from_environ
testcase.failure:
def test_endpoint_from_environ(): os.environ["TD_API_SERVER"] = "http://api1.example.com" td = api.API("apikey") > assert isinstance(td.http, requests.Session) ^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'API' object has no attribute 'http'
tdclient/test/api_test.py:60: AttributeError

testcase.failure:
def test_endpoint_from_keyword(): td = api.API("apikey", endpoint="http://api2.example.com") > assert isinstance(td.http, requests.Session) ^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'API' object has no attribute 'http'

testcase.name: test_no_timeout
testcase.failure:
def test_no_timeout(): with mock.patch("tdclient.api.requests") as requests: td = api.API("apikey") assert requests.Session.called args, kwargs = requests.Session.call_args > assert kwargs["timeout"] == 60 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'timeout'
tdclient/test/api_test.py:157: KeyError

testcase.name: test_timeout
testcase.failure:
def test_timeout(): with mock.patch("tdclient.api.requests") as requests: td = api.API("apikey", timeout=12345) assert requests.Session.called args, kwargs = requests.Session.call_args > assert kwargs["timeout"] == 12345 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'timeout'
tdclient/test/api_test.py:165: KeyError

test_list_bulk_imports_failure

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert ('1: List bul...iled: error',) == ('500: List b...iled: error',)
At index 0 diff: '1: List bulk imports failed: error' != '500: List bulk imports failed: error' Use -v to get more diff

testcase.failure:
def test_list_bulk_imports_failure(): td = api.API("APIKEY") td.get = mock.MagicMock(return_value=make_response(500, b"error")) with pytest.raises(api.APIError) as error: td.list_bulk_imports() > assert error.value.args == ("500: List bulk imports failed: error",) E AssertionError: assert ('1: List bul...iled: error',) == ('500: List b...iled: error',) E E At index 0 diff: '1: List bulk imports failed: error' != '500: List bulk imports failed: error' E Use -v to get more diff
tdclient/test/bulk_import_api_test.py:69: AssertionError

testcase.failure:
def test_export_data_failure(): td = api.API("APIKEY") td.post = mock.MagicMock(return_value=make_response(500, b"error")) with pytest.raises(api.APIError) as error: td.export_data("db", "table", "s3") > assert error.value.args == ("500: Export failed: error",) E AssertionError: assert ('1: Export failed: error',) == ('500: Export failed: error',) E E At index 0 diff: '1: Export failed: error' != '500: Export failed: error' E Use -v to get more diff

testcase.failure:
def test_import_data_failure(): td = api.API("APIKEY") td.put = mock.MagicMock(return_value=make_response(500, b"error")) with pytest.raises(api.APIError) as error: td.import_data("db", "table", "format", b"stream", 6) > assert error.value.args == ("500: Import failed: error",) E AssertionError: assert ('1: Import failed: error',) == ('500: Import failed: error',) E E At index 0 diff: '1: Import failed: error' != '500: Import failed: error' E Use -v to get more diff
